svg.title: Figure GF.4.1 - Prediction/postdiction firewall dashboard
svg.desc: Programmatic vector figure generated for the GCT frontmatter.
svg.text: Numerical matches are sorted by provenance before interpretation; App FM status pills carry the empirical reading.
coefficient + A3 on top of a
Postdiction-consistent, consistent, algebraic, open, pending, and tension rows do not count as in-favor empirical detection evidence. P.20 is postdiction-consistent
conditional on O.5: m_d = m_u phi^phi = 4.716 MeV (+0.33%); P.3 is sensitivity-limited, not resolved.
